Description: Genes encoding components of the complement system, which is part of the innate immune system.
Genes encoding components of blood coagulation system; also up-regulated in platelets.
Genes up-regulated in response to IFNG [GeneID=3458].
Genes encoding components of apical junction complex.
Genes up-regulated in response to alpha interferon proteins.
Genes regulated by NF-kB in response to TNF [GeneID=7124].
